Defines display configurations, orientations, types, dimensions, and pixel data for various Pebble displays.


## Files
- **[display_robert.h](display_robert.h.md)**: Defines display orientation, color, shape, and dimensions for the Pebble firmware.
- **[display_robert_evt.h](display_robert_evt.h.md)**: Defines display orientation, type, and dimensions for Pebble firmware.
- **[display_silk.h](display_silk.h.md)**: Defines display orientation, type, and dimensions for Pebble firmware.
- **[display_snowy.h](display_snowy.h.md)**: Defines display orientation, type, and dimensions for the Pebble firmware.
- **[display_spalding.c](display_spalding.c.md)**: Defines pixel masks and data row information for the Spalding round display in a 180x180 grid.
- **[display_spalding.h](display_spalding.h.md)**: Defines display configurations and constants for the Spalding display in the Pebble firmware.
- **[display_tintin.h](display_tintin.h.md)**: Defines display orientation, type, dimensions, and framebuffer size for the Tintin board.
